data.name: Elven Holes Must Fall
data.detailed_description:
The Elven Queen has declared desire to be the highest form of existence. Commanding castes of elven women, she conquers the world through the arcane art of arousal. Every soul she subjugates fuels a ritual that brings her ever closer to transcendence.

🔥 Drow lead brutal raids.
🌲 Forest elves hunt the survivors.
🧠 High elves oversee the occult structure of domination.

All serve a singular purpose — the grand ritual of sexual enslavement.

You are Brom — a dwarf, once a garrison soldier. After the war, he stayed behind as a blacksmith and brewer in a quiet village. The fortress fell. The village burned. He survived — not because he was a hero, but because he was left behind.

Now, vengeance is all he has. And perhaps… a chance to save what little remains.

This is adult, fantasy RPG, visual novel with rhythm-based combat, resource gathering, character progression, and crafting. Between battles, you’ll manage your equipment, brew potions, talk to NPCs, and explore the world map. The game includes Live2D animations, an unlockable adult content with hot elves.

data.short_description: The Elf Queen conquers the world through arousal magic and mass submission. As the last free dwarf, Brom must rise from the ruins—not to be a hero, but to survive and take revenge.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
